title: read/run/wait strip output text from structuredContent — model sees metadata only
description: GitHub issue #3. Handlers deliberately omit tail/text from structuredContent (duplication concern), but MCP clients that support structured output surface structuredContent to the model and drop the content text block. Result: agent sees only the JSON envelope, no log lines. Fix: include text/tail in structuredContent.
notes: Fix in PR https://github.com/tomfordweb/sidemux/pull/9 — branch fix/structured-output-text. Close on merge.

title: Add safe close_owned cleanup for sidemux panes
description: Add cwd/agent-owned cleanup that skips running panes by default, supports --force for running panes, exposes MCP + CLI surface, and updates docs/tests.
